---
title: "Hi, I'm Pat"
---

I'm a data scientist and statistical programmer who builds tools for understanding the world through data. I work in R, write about statistics and simulations, and occasionally build R packages.

::: {style="display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 1.5rem;"}
[See my projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary} [Read the blog](posts.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

## Featured Projects

|  |  |
|------|------|
| **Have I Studied Enough to Pass?** | A Monte Carlo simulation exploring exam performance — published as [a blog post](posts/monte-carlo-passing-test.qmd). |
| **{ordinalsimr}** | An R package for simulating ordinal data. My first CRAN package. |
| **The Best Sprint Coaching** | Web scraping and analysis of sprint coaching data *(in progress)*. |

## About This Site

In-progress.
